News

Robbie Moore MP urges Miliband to intervene over Bronte Country wind farm consultation

Thursday, 2 April, 2026
Keighley and Ilkley MP Robbie Moore has written to Ed Miliband calling for urgent Government intervention over the timing of a major consultation on the proposed Calderdale Energy Park. The intervention comes amid concerns that the developer plans to launch its statutory consultation on 8 April during the pre-election period (“purdah”), despite clear warnings from both Bradford and Calderdale...
